patches.name: Ultrawide Aspect Ratio
patches.description: Replaces all 7 hardcoded 16:9 aspect-ratio float constants with your configured screen ratio. Covers splash screens, intro cutscenes, gameplay cameras, title screen, menus, HUD, and loading screens. Apply before launching the game.

sites.notes: Code immediate — mov [reg+0x428], 1.7778f. Camera/viewport initialization in .text. Required for gameplay camera bars; also affects intro cutscenes.
Data table entry in .rdata at 0x05D490C0. Read at runtime by both the gameplay camera system and splash/boot renderer. Required for gameplay bars to disappear.
Code immediate — mov [rax+0x428], 1.7778f at 0x03FA1D5B. First of three aspect-ratio writes in the same camera-setup function block.
Code immediate — mov [rdi+0x408], 1.7778f at 0x03FA1DA8. Second write in same camera-setup function; different field offset (+0x408 vs +0x428).
Code immediate — mov [rbx+0x428], 1.7778f at 0x03FA3212. Third write in the same camera-setup function block, different object.
Code immediate — mov [rdi+0x408], 1.7777f at 0x0442199A. Gameplay camera initialization path; writes same field (+0x408) as B2 but from a separate code site.
Data section entry at 0x065675C8 (1.7777f variant). Controls the viewport constraint used by menus, HUD, title screen, and loading screens. Alone it does not fix gameplay bars.
